rationale: Educ. Code §25.111 governs student/teacher ratios and has no dependency on homestead exemption amounts. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter any staffing ratio requirement.
quote: each school district must employ a sufficient number of teachers certified under Subchapter B, Chapter 21, to maintain an average ratio of not less than one teacher for each 20 students in average daily attendance.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this student/teacher ratio statute.
